shellCommands.command:
python3 -m py_compile run.py && python3 - <<'PY'
import asyncio
from run import run_tasks

async def main():
    active=0; peak=0; started=[]; cleaned=[]
    async def f(i):
      nonlocal active,peak
      started.append(i); active+=1; peak=max(peak,active)
      try: await asyncio.sleep(.02)
      finally: active-=1; cleaned.append(i)
    await run_tasks([lambda i=i: f(i) for i in range(8)], 3)
    print(started, cleaned, peak)
    started.clear(); cleaned.clear()
    async def cancel():
      await asyncio.sleep(.01)
      raise asyncio.CancelledError
    async def m():
      t=asyncio.create_task(run_tasks([lambda i=i: f(i) for i in range(8)],3))
      await asyncio.sleep(.025); t.cancel()
      try: await t
      except asyncio.CancelledError: pass
      print('cancel',started,cleaned)
    await m()
asyncio.run(main())
PY

cat > /tmp/test_sigint.py <<'PY'
import asyncio, os, signal
from run import run_tasks
clean=[]; started=[]
async def f(i):
 started.append(i)
 try: await asyncio.sleep(10)
 finally: clean.append(i)
async def main():
 asyncio.get_running_loop().call_later(.05, lambda: os.kill(os.getpid(), signal.SIGINT))
 await run_tasks([lambda i=i:f(i) for i in range(10)], 3)
asyncio.run(main())
PY
python3 /tmp/test_sigint.py; echo status=$?

cat > /tmp/test_sigint.py <<'PY'
import asyncio, os, signal
from run import run_tasks
clean=[]; started=[]
async def f(i):
 started.append(i)
 try: await asyncio.sleep(10)
 finally: clean.append(i)
async def main():
 asyncio.get_running_loop().call_later(.05, lambda: os.kill(os.getpid(), signal.SIGINT))
 await run_tasks([lambda i=i:f(i) for i in range(10)], 3)
try: asyncio.run(main())
except KeyboardInterrupt: pass
print(started, clean)
PY
